title: 0guard Telegram Mini App launch thread
tweets: 0guard update: the Telegram Mini App is live. Open @Raris0guardBot and tap "Open 0guard" to preview wallet intent risk before a signer is touched.
The Mini App validates Telegram initData server-side, returns wallet-alert + Mira previews, and keeps the hard boundary: telegram_send=false, no wallet signing, no transaction broadcasts.

This extends the 0G hackathon proof stack: 28/28 source-linked April 2026 incidents, 28/28 detector coverage, a 0G mainnet receipt anchor, and a Cloud Run Mini App. https://guard0-miniapp-s77j6bxyra-uc.a.run.app/telegram #0GHackathon #BuildOn0G
